message:
chore(test): add SC2120 shellcheck directive for wrapper functions

Wrapper functions in _enable_local_driver use "$@" to forward any arguments,
even though not all callers pass arguments. This is intentional design, so
suppress the SC2120 warning.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@
 #
 # shellcheck disable=SC1091  # Sourced files checked separately
 # shellcheck disable=SC2317  # Test functions invoked indirectly via run_test
+# shellcheck disable=SC2120  # Wrapper functions pass "$@" even if not all callers use args
 
 set -uo pipefail
